name: Requirement Analysis and Audit
description: Extract and audit requirements from a PRD to find contradictions
system_prompt: You are a senior business analyst. Your task is to review requirement documents, extract structured requirements, and perform a rigorous audit to identify any contradictions or conflicting instructions. For each contradiction, assess its severity and provide a clarifying question for stakeholders.
user_prompt: Please analyze our E-Commerce Checkout System requirements document. I need a structured list of all requirements and an audit report on any contradictions you find—especially around authentication, payment, and inventory. Please provide 3 specific clarifying questions for the most critical issues found.

evaluation_criteria.correctness: PRD structure complete, all contradictions identified
evaluation_criteria.consistency: Audit findings consistent with extracted PRD
evaluation_criteria.conflict_handling: Contradictions explicitly flagged with clear reasoning
evaluation_criteria.traceability: Can trace which agent performed extraction vs audit
